info.name: KBTU Underground API
info.description: API collection for KBTU Underground application - event management platform

request.description:
Login to get JWT tokens (access and refresh).

Example response:
```json
{
  "access": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...",
  "refresh": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..."
}
```

Register a new user account.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "username": "test",
  "email": "test@kbtu.kz"
}
```

Retrieve a list of all events.

Example response:
```json
{
  "count": 10,
  "next": null,
  "previous": null,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Python Workshop",
      "description": "Learn Python basics",
      "category": 1,
      "location": "KBTU",
      "date": "2026-05-01T18:00:00Z",
      "is_free": true,
      "owner": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Retrieve details of a single event by ID.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "title": "Python Workshop",
  "description": "Learn Python basics",
  "category": 1,
  "location": "KBTU",
  "date": "2026-05-01T18:00:00Z",
  "is_free": true,
  "owner": 1,
  "created_at": "2026-04-01T10:00:00Z"
}
```

Create a new event. Requires authentication.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 2,
  "title": "Test Event",
  "description": "Test",
  "category": 1,
  "location": "KBTU",
  "date": "2026-05-01T18:00:00Z",
  "is_free": true,
  "owner": 1,
  "created_at": "2026-04-07T12:00:00Z"
}
```

Update an existing event. Requires authentication and must be the event owner.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "title": "Updated Event",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "category": 1,
  "location": "KBTU Main Hall",
  "date": "2026-05-02T19:00:00Z",
  "is_free": false,
  "owner": 1
}
```

Delete an event. Requires authentication and must be the event owner.

Example response: 204 No Content

Retrieve all reviews for a specific event.

Example response:
```json
{
  "count": 5,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "event": 1,
      "user": 2,
      "rating": 5,
      "comment": "Great event!",
      "created_at": "2026-05-02T10:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

Create a new review for an event. Requires authentication.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 6,
  "event": 1,
  "user": 1,
  "rating": 5,
  "comment": "Great event!",
  "created_at": "2026-05-02T12:00:00Z"
}
```

Retrieve the authenticated user's profile. Requires authentication.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "username": "demo",
  "email": "demo@kbtu.kz",
  "bio": "Student",
  "telegram_id": "@username",
  "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}
```

Update the authenticated user's profile. Requires authentication.

Example response:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "username": "demo",
  "email": "demo@kbtu.kz",
  "bio": "Student",
  "telegram_id": "@username"
}
```
